description: Nightshift read-only guard. PreToolUse hook: INERT unless a lane run is active (env NIGHTSHIFT_LANE_RUN set) so it never blocks normal interactive work; when armed it ALLOWs reads everywhere, ALLOWs writes only inside a repo's .nightshift/ pack, and DENYs all other writes + git mutations. Decision logic in src/lib/guard.ts (unit-tested); bundled to hooks/guard.mjs.
